$schema-comment: Source of truth for the autogen stub generator. Lifted out of .claude-plugin/plugin.json#slashCommands in v1.0.2 because the modern plugin manifest schema does not accept a `slashCommands` key. As of v1.1.0 (M4), each entry produces commands/<name>.md with YAML frontmatter `description`. Claude Code natively namespaces these as /coherence:<name> via the plugin name, so the previous `<!-- coherence-command: ... -->` sentinel and the custom UserPromptSubmit dispatcher are gone. v1.1.0 C3: 27 → 17 visible commands — `propose-*`, `plan-*`, `*-statusline` now collapse into subcommand routers (`/coherence:propose <sub>`, `/coherence:plan <sub>`, `/coherence:statusline <sub>`).

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current coherence state: buffer, recent activity, subagent stats, velocity, cost

commands.name: review
commands.description: Run the coherence pipeline mid-session against the current buffer

commands.name: repair
commands.description: Fix anchor collisions, schema drift, buffer corruption, pending.md mismatches

commands.name: recover
commands.description: Clear quarantine, reset locks, drop progress files, remove auto-disable sentinel

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Probe host capabilities and write host-capabilities.json

commands.name: graduate
commands.description: Toggle between Observe and Graduated mode

commands.name: enable-sidecars
commands.description: Provision sidecar YAML files for skills/agents when host strips unknown frontmatter

commands.name: share-metrics
commands.description: Write anonymized metrics to a user-chosen file path

commands.name: propose
commands.description: Manage v0.2 proposals. Subcommands: list, show, accept, reject, revert-acceptance (DD-081/DD-082/DD-083/DD-088). Run bare to see help.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Manage cross-team plans (DD-099). Subcommands: create, accept, reject. Run bare to see help.

commands.name: statusline
commands.description: Manage the coherence statusline. Subcommands: install, uninstall (FR-STATUSLINE-2/3). Run bare to see help.

commands.name: annotate
commands.description: Generate an annotation proposal for an anchor-less doc (DD-069)

commands.name: scope-debug
commands.description: Print walked CLAUDE.md/coherence/scope.json ancestors and resolved scope for a path (DD-097)

commands.name: ignore-split
commands.description: Set up the two-file additive ignore model: coherence/ignore (committed) + coherence/ignore.local (gitignored) (DD-096)

commands.name: export-metrics
commands.description: Write redacted metrics.jsonl to a user-supplied path; prints copy-paste curl only with upload consent (DD-115)

commands.name: de-annotate
commands.description: Strip auto-annotations or graduate them to user-owned anchors (DD-102/DD-110)

commands.name: consent
commands.description: View or update telemetry consent. Flags: --local on|off, --upload on|off, --reset.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Bundling-only audit report (free tier) or LLM cross-section consistency pass (--deep, v1.0).

commands.name: trust
commands.description: View or manage personal + team trust state. Subcommands: --status (default), sync, --promote --auto-land <kinds>, --prune-stale --yes.

commands.name: metrics
commands.description: Quality metrics report: summary, top drifting sections, trust scores, cost trend, revert hotspots.

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Capture session state (version, mode, recent activity, redacted note) into a JSON bundle for the v1.1.0 tester-feedback issue (S6).
